sentence_reviews.text: Ordered observations represent language, events, trajectories, biological sequences, and temporal processes.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html: Appendix B 'Defining Languages with Backus--Naur Form' and algorithms (lines 776-780); PML book1 long TOC: sequence models, language models, transformers, and token/text preprocessing (lines 18-20 and 463-504).
sentence_reviews.notes: Discrete language and sequence structures support the dependency; the exact rationale is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Sequences, events & time series rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html: Appendix B algorithms and pseudocode, Chapter 14 temporal-model inference algorithms, and Chapter 17 algorithms for MDPs (lines 776-780, 365-381, and 441-456).
sentence_reviews.notes: Temporal and sequence inference is presented algorithmically, but the source does not state this dependency verbatim.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Sequences, events & time series is modeled as depending on Discrete mathematics & logic, Signal processing & harmonic analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as Waveforms, audio & spectrograms, Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.

edge_reviews.notes: Discrete language, token, and sequence structures make a requires/core relation defensible.
Sequence and temporal-model inference depend on algorithms; common strength is defensible because this edge is less semantically narrow than discrete math.
